_comment: Rolepod Codex hooks. Core plugin hooks mirror the applicable root hooks/*.sh (the SessionStart/PreToolUse trio is byte-exact parity-enforced by tests/static/lean-surface.sh; claim-verify-nudge mirrors the root UserPromptSubmit hook 1:1 — Codex uses the same event name + camelCase additionalContext as Claude). Claude-only hooks (block-subagent-commit, cohesion-contract-check, session-lifecycle) are NOT registered here because Codex has no Agent / Stop event API and uses a different plugin model. Codex still needs `codex features enable plugin_hooks` before any hook here fires, and plugin-bundled hooks must be trusted by the user before they run.
